title: parse_incoming swallows JSON-RPC errors when id is null
description: transport.rs parse_incoming: v.get('id').is_some() returns true when the id key is present with JSON null value. A server error response with id:null (spec-allowed for parse errors) triggers the response branch, fails JsonRpcResponse deserialization (id: u64 rejects null), emits a warn, and returns None. The error is silently discarded instead of delivered as ClientEvent::Response.
